creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Good day,

My apologies. You'll find an additional patch that remedies the 
leftover file attached to this mail.
If it's easier to have a complete patchfile I can ofcourse make one and 
send that.

Best regards,

Ralf van der Enden

Op 26-12-2012 17:11, Beech Rintoul schreef:
> Leaves files behind. Please fix.
